tagline.title: One-sentence problem this PSC addresses (from page hero or 'Why' section)

narrative.title: 2-3 sentence plain-English description of how the countermeasure works and what crash types it reduces. Verbatim from the FHWA page or tightly paraphrased.

crash_reduction.title: Crash-reduction statistic if quoted on the page (e.g. '83% reduction in fatal/injury crashes at intersections')

image_url.title: Absolute URL of the largest representative photo on the page (hero or first photograph showing the countermeasure in real-world use). Must be a direct image URL ending in .jpg/.jpeg/.png/.webp.

image_alt.title: Alt text or caption of that image, if available on the page
